ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoes" (
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe model */,
  "shoe_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe model */,
  "heel_to_toe_cm" REAL /* Heel-to-toe measurement in centimeters */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used in the shoe */,
  "lace_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of lace used */,
  "primary_color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary color of the shoe */,
  "secondary_color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the secondary color of the shoe */,
  "tertiary_color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tertiary color of the shoe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shoe model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shoe model was last updated */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the shoe model */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the shoe model */,
  "weight_g" REAL /* Weight of the shoe model in grams */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range of the shoe model */,
  "upper_material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the upper material used in the shoe */,
  "sole_material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sole material used in the shoe */,
  "midsole_material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the midsole material used in the shoe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shoe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoes_tertiary_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("tertiary_color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoes_lace_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("lace_type_id") REFERENCES lace_types ("lace_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoes_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoes_secondary_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("secondary_color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoes_primary_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the material */,
  "sustainability_rating" REAL /* Sustainability rating of the material (out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lace_types" (
  "lace_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lace type */,
  "lace_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the lace type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lace type */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used in the lace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lace_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "rgb_values" TEXT /* RGB values of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the shoe is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the shoe in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location within the store */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock check */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory clerk, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the shoe model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the shoe model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the shoe model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "variation_name" TEXT /* Name of the variation */,
  "variation_details" TEXT /* Details of the variation */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_variations_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color entry */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "color_position" TEXT /* Position of the color (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "color_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the color in the shoe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_colors_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material entry */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material used */,
  "sustainability_rating" REAL /* Sustainability rating of the material (out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_materials_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., inventory, color, material) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoes ("shoe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_regions" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id", "region_id")
)
